seoTitle: Topi Topi vs Toronto — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Topi Topi and Toronto. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Topi Topi vs Toronto: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Topi Topi and Toronto.
heading: Topi Topi vs Toronto — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Topi Topi, New South Wales and Toronto, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Toronto has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Topi Topi (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Topi Topi or Toronto safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Topi Topi has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Toronto scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Topi Topi scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Toronto scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Topi Topi or Toronto?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Toronto has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
